rooms.name: Forest Entrance
rooms.description: The trees grow thick enough here to swallow the path from the manor. Sunlight breaks through in bright green shafts, birds call overhead, and something heavier moves somewhere beyond the trunks. The wilds feel alive in a way the manor never did.
rooms.dev_note: // me and jake made this part during lunch

rooms.name: Northern Forest
rooms.description: The northern trees are ancient and enormous. Some have faces in their bark, though no knife marks show who carved them. Moss softens the ground, and little mushrooms cluster near roots like they are marking quiet trails.
rooms.description_cleared: With the spider gone, the northern forest seems older than dangerous. The faces in the bark still watch, but the mushrooms at their roots glow softly, pointing deeper into the wilds.
rooms.dev_note: // the trees with faces are based on this cool book I read

rooms.name: Central Forest
rooms.description: You are in the heart of the forest. The canopy is so thick the sky appears only in small blue cracks. Vines hang from the branches, the air is warm and damp, and animal tracks cross the ground in every direction.
rooms.description_cleared: The central forest quiets after the wolf falls. Tracks still cross the earth, but now you can read the paths: one back toward the manor, one toward the clearing, and one toward the dry road beyond the trees.
rooms.dev_note: // the clearing is based on the field behind school

rooms.name: Clearing
rooms.description: You come out into a wide clearing of tall golden grass and wildflowers. A stone circle stands in the center, its lower stones ringed by tiny red and grey mushrooms. The sky is bright here, but the circle makes the safe place feel like it is hiding a second door.
rooms.dev_note: // this is my favorite part of the wilds. its so peaceful

rooms.name: Southern Forest
rooms.description: The southern forest is darker, its trees twisted and bent toward each other. Spider webs stretch between trunks, and glowing eyes watch from the bushes. This part of the wilds does not pretend to be friendly.
rooms.description_cleared: The webs still hang between the southern trees, but the glowing eyes are gone. The path feels narrow and tense, yet it no longer feels like something is counting your steps.

rooms.name: Stream
rooms.description: A clear stream runs through the forest, cold enough to sting your fingers. Fish flash under the surface, and a little waterfall spills over smooth sitting stones. Something bright glints beneath the current near a broken fishing pole.
rooms.dev_note: // I want to add fishing as a minigame someday

rooms.name: Mountains
rooms.description: The forest thins as the ground climbs. Rocky cliffs and narrow paths wind toward the peak, and the air grows cold enough to bite. Below, the forest and manor shrink into toys. To the west, dark clouds gather over a wasteland.
rooms.dev_note: // this connects to the darkness region which is really scary

rooms.name: Mountain Peak
rooms.description: You stand at the mountain peak. The manor, forest, wastes, and dark lands all spread below in a single impossible map. Wind tears across the snow-covered rocks. A massive cave entrance waits ahead, and something inside it breathes like falling stone.
rooms.description_cleared: The Mountain Troll lies still beside the cave entrance. The wind remains fierce, but now it feels like a banner instead of a warning. From here you can see the world opening in every direction.
rooms.dev_note: // the troll boss is here!! hes really tough
